title: Safety Assurance Engineer — Nuclear Decommissioning
description_raw:
Morson Talent are seeking a Safety Assurance Engineer to support the nuclear quality assurance function on the Hinkley Point C new build programme. This is a contract role engaged outside IR35.

The Safety Assurance Engineer will provide independent assurance review of mechanical installation work packages, including pipework systems, pressure vessel installation, and reactor building mechanical fit-out.

Responsibilities:
- Independent review and sign-off of mechanical installation work packages against quality plans
- Participate in nuclear safety review committees (SRC) and inspection sign-off
- Verify compliance with NDA nuclear quality standards and RCC-M / ASME III requirements
- Maintain quality records on site EDMS (Aveva); manage NCR process
- Conduct hold point and witness point inspections on safety-critical mechanical plant

Profile:
- Mechanical or nuclear engineering degree
- SQA or NQA background with nuclear construction experience
- Knowledge of ASME III, RCC-M, or BS EN ISO 3834 welding quality standards
- Experience with pipework, pressure vessels, or reactor building mechanical scope
- SC clearance held or clearable to DV

Rate: Adzuna has converted the day rate to an annual equivalent figure.
Duration: 24 months
Start: September 2026
Location: Hinkley Point C, Bridgwater
